name: Spicy Pineapple Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs to blend. Gradually add oil, sugar, and vanilla extract. Continue beating until thick and foamy.
2. Stir in grated zucchini and crushed pineapple.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, walnuts, and raisins.
4. Gently stir the dry mixture into the zucchini mixture until just blended.
5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Dust the finished cake with powdered sugar or top with cream cheese frosting.
